decisions.title: Remotely & Silent Uninstall Laserfiche 10.3 and 10.4 Client
decisions.note: Windows Client installer/uninstall discussion, not a source-backed match for the targeted API or Snapshot error row.

decisions.title: Forms 11 - Saves/prints field data on page with extra codes.
decisions.note: Forms print/save rendering issue, not the API Server upload 409 conflict.

decisions.title: Swagger v2.0 Definition of Self-Hosted Laserfiche API?
decisions.note: API OpenAPI/Swagger compatibility discussion, not an error scenario or fix for upload conflict 409.

decisions.title: Laserfiche VM DEMO on Cloud Provider
decisions.note: VMware/cloud virtualization question, no Laserfiche error troubleshooting content for this row.

decisions.title: Laserfiche API On Premise upload failing
decisions.note: Matches API Server upload 409; accepted workaround was creating/selecting a new volume, with staff diagnosis that copied/restored repository database and volume can be out of sync and Tech Support can provide an integrity tool.

decisions.title: The requested service 'ILicensingService' may not be running. [LFF3004-UnableToOpenServiceProxy]
decisions.note: LFF3004 thread suggests checking Forms Routing Service but does not confirm a final fix.

decisions.title: How Can I Override the User Task Going to a Group
decisions.note: Contains LFF6010 InvalidJavaScriptFilter scenario; accepted fix is to return team member objects from team.findTeamMembersByUserName/displayName and verify saved process variable values.

decisions.title: Forms Team Javascript filter no longer working with Forms 11 update 5
decisions.note: Direct LFF6010 FilterReturnedScriptError match for Forms 11 Update 5; staff notes hotfix for running instances plus restart user task or clear main_instance_extended_data, and later says fixed in Forms 12 bug 510207.

decisions.title: Forms Notification Hub not working on SSL
decisions.note: Direct LFF8100 SSL notification hub match; accepted fix includes binding certificate and URL ACL to port 8181 with netsh, stopping Hub Service first, and verifying Forms/Notification URL settings use matching FQDN.

decisions.title: How to properly, step-by-step configure Laserfiche with a SSL Cert?
decisions.note: Forms SSL conversion discussion that includes notification-server-down symptoms; staff/community guidance is to move to working FQDN/DNS first, then apply certificates whose hostnames are trusted and match the configured Laserfiche service URLs.

decisions.title: IPushNotificationService May Not Be Running
decisions.note: LFF8100-related notification service troubleshooting; verify/restart Laserfiche Notification Master Service, inspect LFNotificationService logs, and check SSL/TLS bindings, URL ACL, and DMZ Hub/Master port routing.

decisions.title: Forms - Configuration improperly stating The Connection Verified for Notification Service Server
decisions.note: Direct LFF8100 match; staff explains Forms test only checks Master Service connection and Hub URL must be configured with an accessible FQDN, then review Notification Hub/Master configs and LFNotificationService logs.

decisions.title: Load Balancing Forms When Routing Service is Not In NLB
decisions.note: Direct LFF8100 load-balanced Forms match; staff explains NLB Forms servers must point to the primary Routing/Notification services and ports 8268 and 8181 must be open between Forms, Master, Hub, and browsers.

decisions.title: Reading Laserfiche errors
decisions.note: Direct LFF9320/LFF9309 validation aggregate scenario; community answer explains Position maps to field order and backend validation can be adjusted from the form layout/settings gear, with caution about weakening validation.

decisions.title: Javascript invalidating data
decisions.note: Direct LFF9320/LFF9313 invalid collection/table scenario caused by replacing form fields with custom script; staff guidance is to hide fields and insert links after them instead of removing/replacing fields.

decisions.title: Adding values in dropdown list forms with jquery
decisions.note: Direct LFF9320/LFF9309 invalid choice scenario caused by JavaScript-added dropdown values; staff fix is to disable backend validation or use configured choices.

decisions.title: How to change Backend Validation
decisions.note: Direct LFF9320/LFF9309 validation aggregate scenario; accepted answer explains where to change Backend Validation in Forms settings/gear icon for Forms 10.2.

decisions.title: Errors encountered during forms submission
decisions.note: Direct LFF9320/LFF9312/LFF9300 validation aggregate scenario in Forms 11; suggested diagnostic/fix is to test disabling backend validation when required fields validate in UI but fail on submission.

decisions.title: Error reading XML file - The XML file being uploaded has been corrupted
decisions.note: Forms XML import/report bug, not Snapshot print service or Snapshot driver error 126/1377.

decisions.title: Unattended Installation (LFGet.exe) - Permissions issue
decisions.note: Laserfiche Installer/LFGet Intune deployment issue, not Snapshot print service or Snapshot driver error 126/1377.

decisions.title: "Error reading HTTP response body" when downloading in Mac OS X
decisions.note: Direct Web Access/Web Client download match; community-reported fixes include replacing the problematic page and disabling BranchCache on the Laserfiche server when caching caused the error.

decisions.title: TemplateInfoReader Limit?
decisions.note: Same Error reading HTTP response body pattern in SDK template enumeration; staff suspects a bug or specific template/field issue and later suggests proxy/firewall interference if the connection abort recurs.

decisions.title: Error Reading HTTP response body.
decisions.note: Workflow briefcase-copy issue not the Web Client HTTP response body entry.

decisions.title: LF Audit Service Event Log Error
decisions.note: Same Error reading HTTP response body/0x2efe pattern; accepted diagnostic maps 0x2efe to ERROR_INTERNET_CONNECTION_ABORTED and suggests intermittent network issues if Audit Trail later succeeds.

decisions.title: Export Volumes using SDK
decisions.note: SDK volume export thread contains the same HTTP response-body message but has no confirmed diagnosis or fix yet.

decisions.title: A lost connection condition has been detected error weblink 8.2
decisions.note: Confirmed WebLink Windows XP IIS MaxConnections workaround.

decisions.title: Forms start a workflow business Process
decisions.note: Direct 0735-WF1/LFF5203 workflow business-process scenario; final fix was logging out of the Client and back in, with staff noting a Client bug for newly published business processes.

decisions.title: LFF5203
decisions.note: Requester confirmed disabling Forms AutoRetry and restarting Forms Routing Service stopped duplicate triggers.

decisions.title: The call to Laserfiche Workflow API was not successful
decisions.note: Thread documents Forms wait timeout and OperationTimeout registry workaround from Laserfiche support.

decisions.title: Temporary error "The call to Laserfiche Workflow API was not successful. (The operation has timed out.). [LFF5203-WFServerApiFault]"
decisions.note: Later reply reports resolving by changing Workflow Subscriber service back to LocalSystem.
